title: Pawlpi In Bul Khat Nei Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pawlpite a bul in ah, I Topa Jesuh hi;
A sile a thu inah, Pawlpi hong bawlzo hi;
Azi
siangtho piang dingin, Vantung pan hong kum hi;
Hong pua a si’n hong lei a, Hinna dingin hong
si.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mi lak pan hong teelkhia a, pum khat hong bangsak hi;
Pasian thu tawh hong
suaksuk, Amah bek om hi;
Jesuh a min siangtho in, Tua min bek i phat hi;
Muanna lam-etna khat bek,
Phatna’ng i hahkat hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pawlpite simmawh uh a, Nakpi’n bawlsia uh
hi;
Galte in nawtgawp uh a, Pawlpi’n Suangpi beel hi;
Upna tawh midikte in, Bangtan sawt
ding hiam? ci;
Zan bei-a khuavak ciangin, nopna hong tung ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Haksatna le
bawlsiatna, nakpi-in a thuak hi;
A gualzo mi siangte tawh, nuamsa mahmah uh hi;
Tua mi siangthote
bangin, ko nong hehpih ding hi;
Ka ginat loh uh hangin, Nong maan khawmpih ding hi.
